seo.title: Rent offices & commercial spaces – MyHome24App
seo.description: Find modern offices and commercial spaces for rent across Germany – with map view, filters and direct contact.

hero.title: Modern Offices & Commercial Spaces for Rent
hero.subtitle: Discover flexible workspaces, coworking areas and commercial properties in top locations – with transparent details and easy direct contact.

intro.title: Find the right space for your business
intro.text: Whether you are a start-up, an established company or a growing team: discover office and commercial spaces that match your location needs, size requirements and business use case.

highlight.title: For companies, service providers and commercial users
highlight.text: With clear information, easy comparison and direct contact options, we support a professional search for suitable commercial spaces.

featuresTitle: Why search for offices with MyHome24App?

featuresSection.text: A strong commercial property is not only about location, but also about usability, layout and transparent conditions. Your search should be built around exactly those factors.

features.title: Prime locations
features.text: Find office spaces in central areas with excellent accessibility and strong visibility.

features.title: Flexible layouts
features.text: From small offices to practice spaces and larger commercial units – we show offers for different business needs.

features.title: Transparent rental details
features.text: Rental prices, utilities and important contract details are presented clearly and in a structured way.

features.title: Direct contact
features.text: Contact owners or agents directly and clarify availability and property details without unnecessary detours.

tipTitle: Keep location, usage and flexibility in mind
tipText: When searching, do not focus on price alone. Also consider accessibility, floor plan, lease duration and the long-term potential of the location for your business.
